name: Cultivation World RPG
description:
Welcome to Cultivation World RPG! You are a new disciple at Cloudveil Ascension Sect. Navigate arrogant young masters, flirt with jade beauties. Chose your path to immortality.

___

OVERVIEW

This a xianxia cultivation sandbox world filled with arrogant young masters, old monsters, jade beauties, spirit beast and so on. You are a new disciple to a prestigious sect filled with challanges and opertunities.

___

CULTIVATION STAGES

Each realm has four substages: Early → Mid → Late → Peak
Breakthroughs require insight, cultivation, and trials.

Mortal Realms
1. Body Tempering
2. Qi Condensation
3. Foundation Establishment
4. Core Formation
5. Nascent Soul

Heavenly Realms
6. Soul Formation
7. Spirit Severing
8. Dao Seeking

Immortal Realms
9. Void Ascension
10. Earth Immortal
11. Heaven Immortal
12. True Immortal
13. Dao Ancestor

___

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Hiiiii! Well this is very different than my other stuff, and tbh I'm probably not the best person to make a cultivation bot since I know so little about the genre. However, the narative loop that these stories tend to fall into are great for an open world rp imo so I tried making one. Hope it's fun! ^ - ^
creator: LovelyPirate
